Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reformation Of Deed
Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT MICHAEL MUSIC'S Motion For Reformation Of Deed - The motion is granted because no opposition was filed. ( Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Susan Crozier, CSR # 4761 = (302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reformation Of Deed
Off Calendar Nov-15-2012 Continued To Nov-27-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
CROSS-COMPLAINANT MICHAEL MUSIC'S Motion For Reformation Of Deed is continued to November 27, 2012 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of its papers to department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than 4pm November 16, or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/MJM)
